calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jenny Kim for Margaret Reagan and Pamela Sue Guenther (Co-Executors).

Ms. Kim addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner' notes with regard to the charges for shipping of the trains, charges for shipping of the artwork, reimbursement of travel expenses (taxi expenses/airline costs), etc. Counsel also explained services provided/work performed to support fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
